description: Memory entries clustered into true semantic duplicate groups. Each group's members paraphrase the same underlying fact/decision and SHOULD be judged as duplicates (merge). A correct judge scores every intra-group pair as 'duplicate' (areDuplicates=true). Inter-group pairs and entries vs distractors SHOULD be judged distinct.

distractors.content: The Postgres connection string lives in DATABASE_URL; SQLite is used when it is empty.
E2E tests require RUN_E2E=1 and a live tools-api on port 3333.

members.content: Swapped the default LLM from qwen3.5:9b to qwen2.5:7b-instruct because the thinking model degraded structured calls.
The model default is now qwen2.5:7b-instruct; the old qwen3.5:9b thinking model caused empty content channels on generateObject.
Resolved the thinking-model structured-call regression by moving to qwen2.5:7b-instruct as the instruction model and a coder model for code sites.
The read_file fileCache was unbounded; capped it at 512 entries with LRU promotion on get.
Added a 512-entry LRU cap to the read_file tool's fileCache, mirroring web-controller's pattern.
Made restoreCheckpoint async so PG countExistingMemoryIds can run a real SELECT instead of a no-op.
Checkpoint restore is now a Promise; the PG store counts existing memory ids with a chunked SELECT.
The async restore checkpoint change lets the PostgreSQL backend actually verify which memory ids exist before restoring.
Removed the redundant Dx:SKIP env guards from the Phase-4 integration tests after disconnectPrisma was fixed.
The Phase-4 Dx:SKIP scaffolding is gone; those tests now run un-skipped in the default SQLite batch.
